- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
  Summary: `.github/copilot-instructions.md` exists.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: Confirmed Next.js TypeScript app with Bible book/chapter/verse navigation, verse image URL linking, and captions.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Manually scaffolded a Next.js 16 App Router TypeScript project in `.` because in-place `create-next-app` was blocked by the folder name.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Implemented Bible APIs, WOL scraping/parsing, verse image storage, and full UI flow (books -> chapters -> chapter verses with markers, location header, back button, upload form, and verse image preview).

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No extensions were required by project setup info.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Installed dependencies and verified `npm run lint` and `npm run build` pass.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Created and started task `Run Next.js Dev Server` (`npm run dev`).

- [x] Launch the Project
  Summary: Debug launch confirmed and started; added `.vscode/launch.json`.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: README and this instructions file are present and updated for the current project state.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
